description.en: MyBank is a European online bank transfer payment method that lets shoppers pay from their bank account through online banking authorization.

content_features.title: Online bank transfer payments
content_features.description: Accept customer-initiated payments directly from online banking without requiring card details.

content_features.title: Redirect authorization flow
content_features.description: Shoppers are redirected to authenticate in their bank environment to approve the payment.

content_features.title: Improve authorization success
content_features.description: Use clear instructions and consistent amount/currency presentation to reduce failed or abandoned authorizations.

content_features.title: Bank-level authentication
content_features.description: Leverage bank authentication to help reduce unauthorized payment risk on eligible transactions.

content_features.title: Checkout reliability and fallbacks
content_features.description: Design your checkout to handle redirects, cancellations, and timeouts gracefully with clear status updates.

content_features.title: Reconciliation and payment status
content_features.description: Set expectations for payment status timing and implement strong reconciliation to match bank transfer references.

content_features.title: Disputes and returns
content_features.description: Plan for return/refund handling and provide order evidence to respond to disputes where applicable.

tip:
Log redirect outcomes (success, cancel, timeout) and show a retry option.
This reduces drop-offs and improves authorization completion rates.

faq.question: What is MyBank?
faq.answer: MyBank is a bank transfer payment method that lets customers pay from their bank account via online banking authorization.

faq.question: Does MyBank require shoppers to enter card details?
faq.answer: No. Payments are initiated through the shopper’s bank flow rather than a card form.

faq.question: Why do some MyBank payments fail or get abandoned?
faq.answer: Common causes include shopper cancellation, bank session timeouts, mismatched amount/currency, or incomplete redirect handling. Track outcomes and offer a retry path.

faq.question: Is MyBank a PSP or an acquirer?
faq.answer: MyBank is a payment method. You typically access it through a PSP/gateway that supports it and handles the integration, settlement, and reporting.

faq.question: Where is MyBank available?
faq.answer: Availability depends on your PSP and the shopper’s supported banks/markets. Confirm supported countries and banks with your provider before launching.

faq.question: How should I handle disputes for MyBank payments?
faq.answer: Keep order evidence, delivery/fulfillment proof, and customer communications. Your PSP will guide you on the applicable dispute/return process for bank transfers.

seo.seo_description: MyBank is an online bank transfer payment method for European merchants, enabling shoppers to authorize payments via their bank. Learn fit, flows, and ops tips.
